title: PlanetLingua - learn languages in 30 minutes a day

description.title: PlanetLingua
description.lead: Spend 30 minutes daily, travel to new language planets, unlock new days, and learn through play.

tutorial.title: Language learning as a space adventure
tutorial.intro: PlanetLingua combines short daily learning sessions with game mechanics. You build consistency, earn rewards, and track real progress every day.
benefits: A steady routine: 30 minutes of learning per day.
Unlocking new days and language planets.
Bonuses that increase motivation and pace.
Game elements that connect learning with fun.
A clear progress path for each language.

how.title: How to start
how.caption: First launch
items: Choose the language planet you want to start with.
Set your daily 30-minute learning routine.
Complete the first tasks and earn starter points.
Come back every day to unlock the next day.
Keep your streak to open new planets faster.

progress.title: Planet travel and progress
progress.intro: Each completed session moves you forward:
progress.caption: Progress map
items: Each day is a new stage to unlock.
Progress is tracked separately for each language.
Consistency is rewarded with faster unlocks.
Harder challenges appear as you improve.
Your rocket reaches new language planets.

bonuses.title: Bonus types
bonuses.intro: The app includes multiple bonus systems to support learning:
bonuses.caption: Bonus system
items: Daily login and streak bonuses.
Rewards for fully completing the daily session.
Extra points for accurate answers.
Special event and time-limited challenge bonuses.
Achievements that unlock more gameplay elements.

customization.title: Rocket customization
customization.intro: You can change your rocket look and build your own travel style:
customization.caption: Rocket customization
items: Unlock new skins and visual parts.
Match the rocket look to your achievements.
Use bonus rewards to personalize your ship.
Each change highlights your learning progress.
Fun and motivation grow with your results.

showcase.title: Main screen showcase
showcase.intro: The start screen shows the rocket, language planets, and quick start for a 30-minute session.
showcase.caption: PlanetLingua home screen

data.title: Data and account
data.p1: PlanetLingua stores only the data required for learning progress, day streaks, and bonuses.
data.p2: You can request account and data deletion at any time.

video.title: Video - how PlanetLingua works
video.walkthrough: Short walkthrough: daily session, planet travel, and unlocking new days.

keywords: planetlingua, language learning, 30 minutes daily, gamified learning, bonuses, language planets, rocket customization

hero.title: PlanetLingua
hero.subtitle: Learn languages daily and discover new planets
